negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday body centroid drift reversal rank over body centroid drift pressure, centroid acceptance failure, body range contraction, close rejection from centroid, counter-wick confirmation, volume centroid engagement, VWAP centroid reversion pressure, session phase maturity, prior-day centroid context, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0097 R0001 shows the tested body centroid drift reversal surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0097 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0098 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 1 profitable and 8 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -153.38, and worst fold rw_009 net PnL -34.17.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 23.28 total net PnL across 7 better and 2 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0097 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or body-centroid-drift-reversal feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday body centroid drift reversal rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0097 R0001 tests whether candle-body centroid drift pressure, centroid acceptance failure, body contraction, centroid rejection, counter-wick confirmation, volume centroid engagement, VWAP centroid reversion pressure, session maturity, prior-day centroid context, and spread stress inverse form a portable target-first reversal surface after realistic FPMarkets US100 spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0096 wick stack pressure reversal. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.
